sources.title: Quest For Zhu. 2011.bdrip.xvid
sources.description: The heartwarming tale of four lively Hamsters on a quest to find the Palace of Zhu, where they believe all their dreams will come true. They soon find themselves swept away to the other side of the Zhuniverse.

metadata.Plot: The heartwarming tale of four lively Hamsters on a quest to find the Palace of Zhu, where they believe all their dreams will come true. They soon find themselves swept away to the other side of the Zhuniverse.
metadata.Actors: Mariah Wilkerson, Shannon Chan-Kent, Ian James Corlett
